name: Million Dollar Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the broken Hershey bars and dainties, vanilla, marshmallow cream, and oleo in a 6-8 quart container.
2. In a separate saucepan, mix together the sugar and milk. Cook over medium heat until it reaches boiling point.
3. Continue cooking for six (6) minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Pour the hot mixture over the chocolate mixture and stir until smooth.
5. Stir in the chopped pecans.
6. Using a spoon, drop small portions of the fudge onto wax paper.
7. Allow the fudge to stand at room temperature for 4-6 hours before serving.
(Makes 6 pounds). Please enjoy.
